_comment_brake_colors: zone1 = blue (lightest braking, 0-25%), zone2 = green (26-50%), zone3 = orange (51-75%), zone4 = red (hardest braking, 76-100%). Keys are position-based, not color-based, so any color change here needs no code changes.
_comment_throttle_color: Throttle uses a single white zone across all 100 LEDs. Brightness is set at 50% of brake brightness (76) by halving the RGB values: 128,128,128 instead of 255,255,255. No separate brightness setting needed.
